bead.title: FEAT-008 P4: US-099 command palette (Cmd+K)
bead.description: Global palette in +layout.svelte. Cmd+K / Ctrl+K / Escape. bits-ui Command in <dialog> for focus trap. Command MUST expose role=listbox with role=option items. paletteSearch(query) with 200ms debounce. Results clickable (.click(), not arrow+Enter). On /beads/[beadId] routes, prepend bead-specific actions: Claim, Unclaim, Close, Reopen, Re-run, Delete — include ALL of these regardless of bead status (test expects Reopen visible on open beads). Preserve node/project context on navigation results.
bead.acceptance: e2e/palette.spec.ts 6/6 green; listbox/option roles exposed correctly.
